creator: vj562001@yahoo.de
text:
Dear Edwin,

it's an upgrade and I approve it. But the reason is simple. The patch 
was submitted by myself. By now I want to use a different e-mail address 
for my open source related activities.

Kind regards,

Veit Jahns

On 09.03.2010 21:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of print/latex-biblatex,
>
> Please note that PR ports/144600 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/144600
>
>
